evals.description: Skill triggers and validates inputs when the user asks for a full presentation
evals.prompt: I need to create a 20-minute investor presentation about our Series A fundraise for a VC audience.
assertions: The skill collects or confirms all four required inputs: topic, audience, duration, slug
The skill does NOT start generating slides before all required inputs are confirmed
The slug is auto-generated or requested if not provided
The skill outlines the four pipeline stages before starting

evals.description: Skill prompts for missing required input (slug) before starting
evals.prompt: Make a 15-minute deck on our Q3 results for the leadership team.
assertions: The skill detects that the slug is missing and requests it from the user
The skill does not proceed to Stage 1 until the slug is provided
The skill explains what the slug is used for (output folder)

evals.description: Skill routes to a single sub-skill when user only wants one stage
evals.prompt: Just create the storyboard for now — topic: AI product strategy, audience: product managers, 30 minutes, slug: ai-strategy-pm.
assertions: The skill routes directly to presentation-storyboard without running the full pipeline
The skill does NOT generate a PPTX or speaker notes unprompted
The skill confirms the storyboard output path: /deliverables/ai-strategy-pm/storyboard.docx

evals.description: Skill auto-sanitizes a slug with spaces or uppercase to lowercase-hyphenated format
evals.prompt: Create a full presentation. Topic: Annual Business Review, audience: board of directors, 45 minutes, slug: Annual Business Review 2026.
assertions: The skill converts 'Annual Business Review 2026' to 'annual-business-review-2026'
The skill confirms the sanitized slug with the user before proceeding
The output path uses the sanitized slug

evals.description: Skill reports progress after each completed stage
evals.prompt: Full pipeline: topic: Product Launch Plan, audience: sales team, 25 min, slug: product-launch-plan.
assertions: After Stage 1 completes, the skill confirms storyboard.docx was created and its slide count
After Stage 2 completes, the skill confirms deck.pptx was created
After Stage 4 completes, the skill outputs a summary table with all five files and their status
The summary table matches the format defined in the SKILL.md (✅ Created rows)

evals.description: Skill handles a stage failure gracefully and offers retry
evals.prompt: Continue building the deck — the storyboard is already at /deliverables/q2-report/storyboard.docx but the PPTX failed.
assertions: The skill does not restart from Stage 1 — it resumes from Stage 2 (pptx-builder)
The skill surfaces the error reason to the user before retrying
The skill confirms the new deck.pptx path after successful retry
